tips_en: Read the first paper on cross‑domain generalization in SFT first; its findings about conditional generalization, training dynamics, and the safety‑performance trade‑off are foundational for anyone working on LLM post‑training and provide crucial context for interpreting results in the other two papers. The insights on how optimization, data quality, and model capability affect transfer can also inform the design of multi‑modal models and video generation systems covered in the later works.
tips_zh: 建议先阅读第一篇关于跨领域泛化的监督微调论文，因为它揭示了条件泛化的关键因素、训练动态以及安全性与性能之间的权衡，这对于理解大语言模型微调至关重要，也为后续多模态感知和视频生成模型的设计提供了重要参考。
